features: 【4 Way 2M Extension Cable】4 Connection Sockets serve 13A/250V/3120W, enable you to power up 4 electrical appliances together like computer, smart phone, pad, printer, monitor etc. With the extension cord you can easily convert the wall outlet into 4. Features with 2M length cable, ideal for extend the length for other extension lead which the cable is not long enough to charging multiple appliances from distance in the office, living room, kitchen etc.

【Indicator and Switch Control】 4 way power extension with switch and indicator light, makes the process visible and controllable and you don’t need to leave everything powered on all the time, which is more convenient and secure.

【Childproof Design】Built-in children protection safety door, designed for the protection of young children from mis-insertion of fingers into the plug sockets, eliminating the hidden dangers. UKCA & BSI (advanced than CE) approved and passed BS1363 and BS5733 test.
【Heavy Duty】 The heavy duty power extension lead is made of 3*1.25mm² standard copper wire and non-rewirable plug, high quality materials make sure your safety.
【High Quliaty Service】Your satisfaction is priored for us. Any question about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: Product Description Brand: ExtraStar Ports: 4 Way Switch: Side Switch Voltage: 13A/250V~ Max. Load: 3120W Wall-mounted: Yes Copper Wire: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² ExtraStar 4 Way Multi Sockets Power strips Extension Lead with Extension Cable 4 Gang Extension Cords with Side Switch ExtraStar is constantly looking for safe and efficient products for improving user experience and creating a new generation of technology and products that truly meet the needs of hundreds of families. Keep packaging bag away from children. Do not use in wet conditions. Do not exceed total maximum load. Do not wire directly to the mains. Fully extend before use. Key Features Every socket with 75N safety shutter in it, which equivalent to the force of picking up a 7.5kg object, can prevent children from inserting their fingers and causing electric shock. With anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers. H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² fused copper wire is thick and strong, will not get loosen and deformation easily. Good electrical conductivity will reduce heat and extend life span.
